values.heading: The difference is in the details
values.subline: Four principles behind every home we build and every promise we keep.
values.v1d: The focus of New Level Group standards is a principled approach to the quality of all our projects. As a reliable developer in Türkiye, we set a new level of construction, preserving the best and introducing the new. First-class materials and technologies, proven suppliers and a staff of professionals in their field: we lead and control the entire process of construction.
values.v2d: Selecting exclusively investment-attractive locations in Türkiye is key to the success of all New Level Group projects. We create a high-quality, modern product that takes into account all the needs of our clients: residential complexes in areas with good transport access and developed urban infrastructure, surrounded by the natural beauty of the Mediterranean.
values.v3d: We build transparent interactions with clients and partners: we provide all the necessary information, maintain open and trusting communication, and respond to requests in a timely manner. People are at the centre of our attention. We understand our responsibility to society and treat the wishes of our customers and colleagues with exceptional respect.
values.v4d: We prioritise a personalised approach in every client interaction. We take into account all your requests and wishes, which lets us realise construction projects with individual adjustments. We advise and support you in resolving any issues related to buying a home and relocating. Our goal is to make the purchase simple and comfortable: from selecting apartments and closing the deal to caring for your future home.
